_description: Field tooltips for SuiteView. Each key is the field attribute name used in the code.
_maintenance: Edit this file to customize tooltip text. Changes will take effect on next application restart.

total_av.label: Total AV
total_av.tooltip: Total Account Value - The sum of all fund values in the policy as of the last monthliversary date. This includes both unimpaired and impaired (loan collateral) portions.

unimpaired_av.label: Unimpaired AV
unimpaired_av.tooltip: Unimpaired Account Value - The portion of the account value not pledged as collateral for policy loans. This is the sum of all fund values from the fund summary.

impaired_av.label: Impaired AV
impaired_av.tooltip: Impaired Account Value - The portion of the account value pledged as collateral for policy loans. Calculated as TotalFundPrefLnPrinciple + TotalFundRegLnPrinciple.

gav.label: GAV
gav.tooltip: Guaranteed Account Value - The minimum guaranteed account value based on the guaranteed interest rate. Only applicable to certain UL products.

ccv.label: CCV
ccv.tooltip: Current Cash Value - The current surrender value of the policy after deducting any surrender charges.

guar_int_rate.label: Guar Int Rate
guar_int_rate.tooltip: Guaranteed Interest Rate - The minimum interest rate guaranteed by the policy. Stored in database as basis points and divided by 100 for display.

grace_rule_code.label: Grace Rule Code
grace_rule_code.tooltip: Grace Period Rule Code - Determines how the grace period is calculated for this policy. Code comes from LH_NON_TRD_POL.GRA_THD_RLE_CD.

short_pay_prem.label: Short Pay Prem
short_pay_prem.tooltip: Short Pay Premium - The premium amount for policies that are set up with a limited pay duration.

short_pay_dur.label: Short Pay Dur
short_pay_dur.tooltip: Short Pay Duration - The number of years premiums are scheduled to be paid before the policy becomes paid up. From TH_USER_GENERIC.INITIAL_PAY_DUR.

short_pay_mode.label: Short Pay Mode
short_pay_mode.tooltip: Short Pay Mode - The billing mode (annual, semi-annual, quarterly, monthly) for the short pay premium. From TH_USER_GENERIC.INITIAL_MODE.

sp_billing_cease_date.label: SP Billing Cease Date
sp_billing_cease_date.tooltip: Short Pay Billing Cease Date - The date when short pay billing is scheduled to cease.

sp_prem_cease_age.label: SP Prem Cease Age (calc)
sp_prem_cease_age.tooltip: Short Pay Premium Cease Age - Calculated age when short pay premiums will cease. Calculated as Short Pay Duration + Issue Age.

db_dial_to_age.label: DB Dial-To Age
db_dial_to_age.tooltip: Death Benefit Dial-To Age - For dial-to-paid-up policies, this is the age at which the death benefit will reduce to the account value. From TH_USER_GENERIC.DIAL_TO_PREM_AGE.

MonthliversaryValues._table_description: Monthly processing values from LH_POL_MVRY_VAL table

eff_date.label: Eff Date
eff_date.tooltip: Effective Date - The monthliversary date when these values were calculated. From MVRY_DT field.

y.label: Y
y.tooltip: Policy Year - The policy year number at this monthliversary.

m.label: M
m.tooltip: Month of Year - The month number within the policy year (1-12).

interest.label: Interest
interest.tooltip: Interest Credited - The interest credited to the account value for this month. From GUA_RT_ERN_ITS_AMT field.

account_value.label: AccountValue
account_value.tooltip: Account Value - The total account value after this month's processing. From CSV_AMT field.

coi_chrg.label: COIChrg
coi_chrg.tooltip: Cost of Insurance Charge - The monthly cost of insurance deducted from the account value. From CINS_AMT field.

other_chrg.label: OtherChrg
other_chrg.tooltip: Other Charges - Other monthly charges deducted from the account value. From OTH_PRM_AMT field.

expenses.label: Expenses
expenses.tooltip: Expense Charges - The monthly expense/admin charges deducted from the account value. From EXP_CRG_AMT field.

nar.label: NAR
nar.tooltip: Net Amount at Risk - Death Benefit minus Account Value. This is the amount the insurance company is at risk for. From NAR_AMT field.

FundValueHistory._table_description: Fund bucket history showing detailed fund value allocations

fund_id.label: FundID
fund_id.tooltip: Fund Identifier - The code identifying the specific investment fund or bucket.

phase.label: Phase
phase.tooltip: Coverage Phase - The phase code of the coverage this fund bucket belongs to.

mv_date.label: MVDate
mv_date.tooltip: Monthliversary Date - The date when this fund bucket value was recorded.

start_date.label: StartDate
start_date.tooltip: Start Date - The date when this fund bucket was first established.

bucket_value.label: BucketValue
bucket_value.tooltip: Bucket Value - The current value of this specific fund bucket.

UnimpairedFundValues._table_description: Summary of fund values not pledged as loan collateral

fund_id.label: FundID
fund_id.tooltip: Fund Identifier - The code identifying the specific investment fund.

amount.label: Amount
amount.tooltip: Fund Amount - The current value of this fund that is not pledged as collateral for policy loans.

ImpairedFundValues._table_description: Summary of fund values pledged as loan collateral

fund_id.label: FundID
fund_id.tooltip: Fund Identifier - The code identifying the specific investment fund pledged as loan collateral.

amount.label: Amount
amount.tooltip: Impaired Amount - The value of this fund that is pledged as collateral for policy loans (preferred and regular loans).

company.label: Company
company.tooltip: Company Code - The insurance company code that issued this policy. From CO_CD field.

plancode.label: Plancode
plancode.tooltip: Plan Design Series Code - The product plan code. From PLN_DES_SER_CD field.

policy_number.label: Policy
policy_number.tooltip: Policy Number - The unique identifier for this insurance policy.
